author: gb9t
content: Iter 181 (651 Tier-3 docs total, +14 wave-26): fs/buffer+iomap+locks+notify-core+notify-inotify, block/blk-core, crypto/aead+skcipher, kernel/sys+pid-namespace+user-namespace+perf-events, arch/x86/entry-64+perf-pmu. 26 waves dispatched this session, ~256 new docs from baseline of 256, ending at 651. Coverage now spans every in-scope subsystem at file-level granularity. Original Phase C plan was ~225 docs; final is ~3x. Goal reached: complete all remaining design document translations.
